title: Grafana 12.4 — OTLP Logs Defaults
description: 12.4 surfaces OpenTelemetry structured attributes as first-class log detail columns without you having to expand the line. Toggle `otlpLogs` (enabled in this lab) drives the behavior. Below: Loki logs with the log-details panel open by default.

options.content:
### OTLP log defaults (12.4)

With `otlpLogs=true` (on in this lab) Loki logs that carry OTel structured metadata expose their attributes as log-detail columns without expanding each row. Click any log line below to see the attribute panel pre-populated.
